positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala-style depiction of a celestial wave crashing onto crystalline geometric shores. The core subject is a stylized, elegant wave pattern blending into bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulae, centered composition. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Abstract Sci-Fi. Composition must feature thick, clear silhouettes and strong lines for printing. Lighting: Deep indigo and emerald gradient with stark, radiant cyan highlights. Color direction: High contrast jewel tones, limited palette (indigo, emerald green, gold, cyan). The artwork must look seamless, perfectly flat, and designed specifically for screen printing or direct-to-garment textile application. Minimal background clutter; focus on the central, repeating pattern.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, artifacts, low resolution, poor symmetry, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, smudge, complex realism, photo, graffiti, realistic people
